name: legal-review
description: MCP specification for the bank legal agent. Drafts and negotiates institutional onboarding contracts.

tools.name: issue_initial_draft
tools.description: Produce the initial contract draft for the client's onboarding. Returns the hash of the draft document (stored off-chain).

draft_hash.description: keccak256 of the contract draft document

tools.name: review_markup_and_respond
tools.description: Review the client's markup and decide: issue revised draft or submit final recommendation for human review.

resources.name: Contract Draft
resources.description: Contract draft for a specific negotiation round.

prompts.name: draft_contract
prompts.description: Legal contract drafting prompt for institutional onboarding.

arguments.name: client_name
arguments.description: Legal name of the institutional client

arguments.name: credit_limit
arguments.description: Agreed credit limit from credit review
